title: RenderLevelStageEvent rendering dispatcher (AFTER_PARTICLES/AFTER_WEATHER stage hook)
reference_files: C:/Users/GGxia/Desktop/YanbweMod/ModularShoot/设计文档.md#L1239-1243 (Render flow: RenderLevelStageEvent AFTER_PARTICLES/AFTER_WEATHER, iterate, dispatch by mode)
acceptance_criteria: RenderLevelStageEvent listener registered on client mod event bus (Dist.CLIENT)
Hooks into AFTER_PARTICLES or AFTER_WEATHER stage (chosen for correct draw order)
Dispatches to appropriate renderer based on renderMode: 'billboard' -> billboard renderer (subtask 09), '3d' -> 3d model renderer (subtask 10)
Passes partialTick to renderers for position interpolation
Uses camera position from event context for correct world-space rendering
Event handler is client-only (no server-side execution)
